title.en: China-to-Colombia EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入哥伦比亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入哥倫比亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Colombia RETIE electrical-installation, CREG grid-connection, IEC charging-system, connector, 60 Hz, and EV policy expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与哥伦比亚 RETIE 电气安装、CREG 并网、IEC 充电系统、接口、60 Hz 及电动汽车政策要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與哥倫比亞 RETIE 電氣安裝、CREG 併網、IEC 充電系統、接口、60 Hz 及電動汽車政策要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, RETIE scope determination, CREG or distribution-utility grid approval, electrical-installation declaration, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, project owners, operators, and installers should verify current Colombia RETIE, CREG, Ministry of Mines and Energy, distribution-company, IEC, and local electrical requirements with qualified professionals before shipment, sale, installation, or operation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、RETIE适用范围裁定、CREG或配电公司并网批准、电气安装申报、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、项目业主、运营商和安装方在出货、销售、安装或运营前，应与合格专业人士核验现行哥伦比亚RETIE、CREG、矿能部、配电公司、IEC及当地电气要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、RETIE適用範圍裁定、CREG或配電公司併網批准、電氣安裝申報、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、項目業主、營運商和安裝方在出貨、銷售、安裝或營運前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行哥倫比亞RETIE、CREG、礦能部、配電公司、IEC及當地電氣要求。

answer_first.en: For EV chargers exported from China to Colombia, do not treat a China GB/T 18487 or GB/T 20234 file as direct Colombia compliance. The practical file should first check RETIE electrical-safety and installation scope, then map IEC 61851 / IEC 62196 expectations where specified by the project, address Colombia's 60 Hz grid and distribution-utility connection requirements, and keep Ley 1964 incentives separate from product approval.
answer_first.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩出口哥伦比亚时，不应将中国GB/T 18487或GB/T 20234文件视为哥伦比亚直接合规证明。实际资料包应先核查RETIE电气安全和安装适用范围，再在项目要求时映射IEC 61851 / IEC 62196，处理哥伦比亚60 Hz电网和配电公司接入要求，并将Ley 1964激励政策与产品批准区分开。
answer_first.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁出口哥倫比亞時，不應將中國GB/T 18487或GB/T 20234文件視為哥倫比亞直接合規證明。實際資料包應先核查RETIE電氣安全和安裝適用範圍，再在項目要求時映射IEC 61851 / IEC 62196，處理哥倫比亞60 Hz電網和配電公司接入要求，並將Ley 1964激勵政策與產品批准區分開。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, ministry, grid or distribution utility, electrical-installation authority, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
